method: surface profilometry reported in the source paper
operating_conditions: Approximately 0.5 mm circular GaN/III-N membrane after approximately 38 to 57 um CVD diamond growth at approximately 720 to 750 degrees Celsius.
review_notes: Value transcribed from the paper; raw profilometry data are not stored in this repository.

uncertainty.basis: The Figure 13 caption reports the largest standard deviation of the orthogonal profilometry bow traces as 2 um; use this as a conservative paper-level uncertainty note, not a sample-specific metrology certificate.
